name: terport.com.py
message: We are the leading river container, general cargo, and RORO terminal operator in the Parana-Paraguay Waterway. We operate our TERPORT-VILLETA terminal, which is the most sophisticated container terminal in the region, and TERPORT-SAN ANTONIO focused on General Cargo, RORO, Warehousing and Bonded Warehousing services. Our main activities include port services, container depot, warehousing, container freight services, and special cargo projects.
